name: immich
description: Skill for operating immich via the lab MCP server / CLI.

immich_url.title: Immich URL
immich_url.description: Base URL of the Immich API, including scheme. Do not include a trailing slash.

immich_api_key.title: API Key
immich_api_key.description: Immich API key for authenticated requests.

interface.shortDescription: Operate Immich photo and video management workflows.
interface.longDescription: Immich packages workflows for searching assets, reviewing albums and jobs, checking server state, and assisting with self-hosted photo library operations.
defaultPrompt: Use Immich to inspect recent upload status.
Search Immich for assets from a date range.
